title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Judge, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Sanji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You wanna know what this is?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, these...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...are the soldiers of

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: GERMA 66!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Why are they immersed in water?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's just culture fluid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They all have identical faces!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are these guys even alive?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Listen closely, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Humans... can be manu- factured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Germa has always been renowned as "The kingdom of science" throughout the years. Though it may sound far-fetched now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even our father was once hailed as a brilliant scientist back in the day, before we were born.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was a member of a foreign, lawless research team...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And used to work right alongside vegapunk on research and development of hi-tech weaponry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Him... and vegapunk... together?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back when we were but a glint in his eye, yes. ...and so the ground- breaking feat he and vegapunk managed to pull off...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was the discovery of a living organism's "lineage factor"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With but a few minor mutations, they now had the power to do what was once thought only attributable to God himself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In laymans terms, they had basically discovered the blueprints... to life itself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once the WG caught wind of it, they concluded that it was a power too great for man to have access to and immediately arrested vegaplink.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rest of the research team were forced to go their separate ways shortly thereafter... All because some suits thought they were doing what was best for mankind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....Luckily our father managed to escape the witch hunt and continued his research and studies on "Germa".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On his own, he began experimenting with cloning... with gene mutation... and, thus, with the origins of life itself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what you see before you is the fruit of all that labor... All these men were born...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right here in this basement! These men are clones of a select few; highly capable soldiers specifically chosen for this project...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They are also known as the "Clone Paws"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but of course, none of the soldiers themselves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: are actually aware of this fact.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Countless nations shake and tremble at the thought of our military might...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But as great as that fear is, their envy of us is just as great if not greater!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All programmed to stare death in the eye without flinching while being eternally faithful to us, no questions asked!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't blame them really... Strong, fear- less and loyal soldiers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If their lives are lost, we simply have a replacement waiting to take its place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It takes a mere 5 years to produce one 20 year old clone.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You could go so far as to call this place a "soldier Depot"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 5 years!! That's all it takes for these guys to all grow into mature, grown individuals...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that 7 act like they've had life expert-ences for over two decad-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: enough! I don't need to hear anymore!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 38 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
